name: Florida
why_ruby_pro: DBPR licensing compliance without the spreadsheet maze
Beverage tax calculations that handle wine, beer, and spirits differently
Seasonal volume swings managed with real-time inventory
problem: DBPR license tracking scattered across files and emails
Different tax rates for wine, beer, and spirits calculated manually
Tourism-driven demand spikes that catch your inventory off guard
difference: Auto-track DBPR license status across 52K+ Florida accounts
Calculate product-specific beverage taxes on every transaction
Forecast seasonal demand from your actual sales history
how_it_works: Every order applies the right tax rate by product category
See license expiration, credit status, and account health in one view
Manage Florida's on-premise and off-premise complexity from one system
